headline.purpose: Dialog titles and major section headers.

title.purpose: Card titles, sidebar labels, emphasized inline labels.

body.purpose: Primary readable text and chat messages.

label.purpose: Mono labels, file paths, compact metadata.

shadows.name: soft
shadows.purpose: Cards, tooltips, and lightly lifted surfaces.

shadows.name: composer-active
shadows.purpose: Chat input composer while the agent is running.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The default action button. Ink background, white text, rounded-lg.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; background: var(--accent, #171717); color: #ffffff; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(23,23,23,0.05); transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--accent-hover, #000000); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--bg, #f7f7f5), 0 0 0 4px rgba(115, 115, 110, 0.35); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.45; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. White background, border, hover fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid var(--border, #dededb); border-radius: 12px; background: var(--card, #ffffff); color: var(--text, #171717); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(23,23,23,0.05); transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--bg-hover, #f1f1ef); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--border, #dededb) 65%, var(--text-muted, #6f6f6b)); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--bg, #f7f7f5), 0 0 0 4px rgba(115, 115, 110, 0.35); }

components.name: Input
components.description: Standard text field with focus ring and error state.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" placeholder="Ask Pi to build something..." />
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 36px; min-width: 0; padding: 4px 12px; border: 1px solid var(--border, #dededb); border-radius: 10px; background: transparent; color: var(--text, #171717); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; outline: none; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--text-muted, #6f6f6b); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: var(--ring, #73736e); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(115, 115, 110, 0.5); } .ds-input[aria-invalid='true'] { border-color: var(--destructive, #dc2626); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(220, 38, 38, 0.2); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Container with soft shadow and 14px radius.
components.css: .ds-card { border: 1px solid var(--border, #dededb); border-radius: 14px; background: var(--card, #ffffff); color: var(--text, #171717); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(23,23,23,0.05), 0 10px 30px rgba(23,23,23,0.05); } .ds-card-content { padding: 20px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Small floating label with ring and soft shadow.
components.css: .ds-tooltip { display: inline-block; padding: 6px 10px; border-radius: 12px; background: var(--popover, #ffffff); color: var(--text, #171717); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.4; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(23,23,23,0.05), 0 10px 30px rgba(23,23,23,0.05); ring: 1px solid var(--border, #dededb); }

components.name: Badge Default
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; width: fit-content; flex-shrink: 0; padding: 2px 8px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--accent, #171717); color: #ffffff; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Badge Success
components.description: Positive status pill with green tint.
components.css: .ds-badge-success { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; width: fit-content; flex-shrink: 0; padding: 2px 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(22, 163, 74, 0.2); border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(22, 163, 74, 0.1); color: #15803d; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Chat Composer
components.description: The persistent chat input surface with rounded-20px and running-state shadow.
components.css: .ds-composer { overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--border, #dededb); border-radius: 20px; background: var(--card, #ffffff); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(23,23,23,0.04), 0 14px 40px rgba(23,23,23,0.07); transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-composer.running { border-color: rgba(234, 179, 8, 0.4); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(23,23,23,0.05), 0 16px 44px rgba(202, 138, 4, 0.09); } .ds-composer-input { width: 100%; min-height: 72px; max-height: 220px; padding: 16px 16px 8px; border: 0; background: transparent; color: var(--text, #171717); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; resize: none; outline: none; } .ds-composer-input::placeholder { color: var(--text-dim, #9d9d97); }

narrative.overview: Pi Agent Web is a clean, well-lit desk for working with an AI coding agent. The interface exists to keep the developer in control: sessions, files, chat, and model settings are arranged in a three-panel workspace where every surface has a job and nothing competes for attention. The personality is precise, calm, and utilitarian — the agent is a tool, not a character. The visual system rejects decoration for its own sake. Color is almost entirely Warm Paper and Ink; hierarchy comes from tone, spacing, and border rather than heavy shadows or saturated accents. Components feel like precision instruments: rounded just enough to be approachable, but never playful. Motion is short and state-driven, not choreographed.
keyCharacteristics: Warm Paper & Ink palette with near-zero chroma except for status signals.
Flat-by-default elevation; soft shadows only for floating surfaces.
Precision-instrument components: consistent radius, clear states, no flourish.
Inter for UI type; Noto Sans Mono for code paths and compact labels.
Light and dark modes that respect prefers-color-scheme and user preference.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The accent color is the same as the ink. Color is used for state, not branding or decoration.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Inter handles every sans-serif role. Do not introduce a second sans or a display font for personality.

rules.name: The Tonal-First Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only when an element genuinely floats above the content plane.

dos: Do keep the canvas Warm Paper and panels White in light mode.
Do use Ink/accent for primary actions, current selection, and primary text only.
Do rely on tone and border for hierarchy before reaching for shadow.
Do use the mono font for file paths, code snippets, and compact labels.
Do support reduced motion and respect prefers-color-scheme.
donts: Don't use chatty mascots, emoji overload, or bubbly rounded everything.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, or purple-blue gradients.
Don't use neon accents or high-chroma gamer dark mode.
Don't use shadows as the default state for every container.
Don't use display fonts in UI labels or buttons.
Don't use side-stripe borders greater than 1px as a colored accent.
Don't animate layout properties; keep motion to color, opacity, transform, and shadow.
